next_steps: Obtain blood cultures and start empiric IV antibiotics for suspected meningococcemia
Perform STAT echocardiography to evaluate for coronary artery abnormalities
Order CBC with differential, ESR, CRP, procalcitonin, and comprehensive metabolic panel
Obtain urinalysis to assess for hematuria and proteinuria
Perform dermatology consultation and consider punch biopsy of purpuric lesion for H&E and DIF
Collect nasopharyngeal/oropharyngeal swabs for respiratory viral panel and SARS-CoV-2 testing
Consult pediatric infectious disease and rheumatology subspecialists
